title: LedgerLM Security Architecture
description: Title slide — Granular security architecture diagrams for Bosch Cyber Security MS/ECL51 review

title: System Perimeter & Network Zones
description: Azure network architecture — TLS termination, internal port isolation, VNet private endpoints, HTTP security headers

title: Authentication Flow
description: Dual auth path — Email OTP (bcrypt, rate-limited) and Azure AD OIDC SSO with group-based role mapping

title: Session Security & Cookie Policy
description: PostgreSQL-backed sessions, httpOnly/Secure/SameSite=Strict cookie config, HSTS, SESSION_SECRET startup guard

title: Role-Based Access Control
description: Three-tier RBAC — Super Admin, Tenant Admin, Standard/Member — middleware enforcement chain, HTTP 401/403 responses

title: Multi-Tenant Data Isolation
description: Logical tenant isolation via domain_id scoping — all 25+ tables, vector search, Python backend enforcement

title: Azure Key Vault Secret Pipeline
description: Secret injection flow — Key Vault references to App Service env vars, fail-safe startup guard, encrypted connector credentials

title: Encryption — Transit & Rest
description: TLS 1.2+ in transit, AES-256 at rest (Azure), bcrypt OTPs, AES-encrypted connector credentials

title: AI Query Pipeline — Security Controls
description: LLM scope minimization, parameterized SQL, tenant-scoped vector search, deterministic KPI builders

title: TARA Requirements — Implementation Summary
description: All SR controls mapped to implemented status, plus outstanding infrastructure recommendations
